identity.vocalStyle: Dynamic duet with spoken-word intros and verses alternating between intimate close-mic female leads and gritty male replies, culminating in a soaring but weary chorus.
identity.styleSentence: A high-energy (143 BPM) pop-rock anthem driven by a driving F-major key, featuring distorted guitar swells and modern drill-style hi-hats layered over deep 808 bass pulses to create an urgent yet emotionally raw soundscape.
identity.summary: The song depicts a toxic relationship doomed from the start, characterized by domestic chaos, emotional neglect, and the painful realization that love was actually a burden disguised as passion.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A cracked red wall covered in peeling paint, casting long ominous shadows against a dark background.
Blue emergency lights flashing rapidly through rain-streaked windows reflecting on wet asphalt streets.
Stacks of green dollar bills glowing under a harsh spotlight while flowers wither in the background.
A vast empty hallway stretching endlessly into darkness where dust motes hang motionless in still air.
Orange flames consuming a wooden structure, illuminating tear-streaked faces with intense light and smoke.
A pale white moon hanging high in a starless night sky above a lone silhouette standing on a cliff edge.
